title: sagenia subtriphylla
intro: Sagenia subtriphylla, also known as the lousewort or prickly lousewort, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a natural remedy for wound healing and skin irritations. The health benefits of Sagenia subtriphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Sagenia subtriphylla can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
